name: Artichoke Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the artichoke hearts thoroughly.
2. Remove and discard the fuzzy choke from each artichoke heart.
3. Chop the artichoke hearts.
4. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
5. Grease a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
7. Dust the top of the mixture lightly with paprika.
8. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes, or until heated through.
9. Serve hot in a chafing dish.
Makes about 3 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: French or Italian bread, water crackers, snow peas, carrots, salami slices, seafood chunks
